      /* Hide everything except the print area */
      body > *:not(#erp-print-area) {
        display: none !important;
      }
      #root {
        display: none !important;
      }
      /* Show and reset the print area */
      #erp-print-area, #erp-print-area * {
        display: block !important;
      }
      #erp-print-area {
        position: absolute !important;
        left: 0 !important;
        top: 0 !important;
        width: 100% !important;
        height: auto !important;
        background: white !important;
        color: black !important;
        padding: 0 !important;

        opacity: 1 !important;
        visibility: visible !important;
      }
    }

      ${Y}

gg({customers:d,transactions:O,products:k,language:c,onAddCustomer:te,onUpdateCustomer:N,onDeleteCustomer:G,suppliers:Y=[],currencySymbol:F=c==="ar"?"ج.م":"$",onOpenCustomer:X}){const initiation failed:",q),F(!1),f(q.message||"Camera access blocked or unavailable in this environment.")}})(),()=>{Ce()}):void 0,[k]);const Receivables"},{id:"movements",ar:"سجل حركات المنتجات",en:"Product Movements"},{id:"low_stock",ar:"سجل المنتجات المنخفضة",en:"Low Stock"},{id:"profits",ar:"سجل الأرباح والخسائر",en:"Profit & Loss"},{id:"sales",ar:"سجل المبيعات",en:"Sales"},{id:"purchases",ar:"سجل المشتريات",en:"Purchases"},{id:"expenses",ar:"سجل المصروفات",en:"Expenses"},{id:"statements",ar:"كشف حساب العملاء والموردين",en:"Customer & Supplier Statements"}],ll=d=>String(d??"").replace(/&/g,"&amp;").replace(/</g,"&lt;").replace(/>/g,"&gt;").replace(/"/g,"&quot;");function Ig(d){var Ve;const{language:O,currencySymbol:k}=d,c=O==="ar",[te,N]=m.useState("products"),[G,Y]=m.useState(""),[F,X]=m.useState(""),[h,Z]=m.useState(""),[f,Te]=m.useState(""),[W,H]=m.useState(""),[E,ve]=m.useState(""),[Ne,ye]=m.useState(""),[V,Q]=m.useState(""),[ee,y]=m.useState(null),[be,ge]=m.useState({}),we=o=>{var M;return((M=d.products.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(o)))==null?void 0:M.name)||"-"},Ce=o=>{var M;return((M=d.customers.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(o)))==null?void 0:M.name)||"-"},pe=o=>{var M;return((M=d.suppliers.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(o)))==null?void 0:M.name)||"-"},_e=o=>{var M;return((M=d.warehouses.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(o)))==null?void 0:M.name)||"-"},Se=o=>{var M;return((M=d.categories.find(p=>String(p.id)===String(o)))==null?void 0:M.name)||"-"},Be=m.useMemo(()=>{switch(te){case"products":return الطلب":"Min Qty"]:o.minQuantity,[c?"التكلفة":"Cost"]:o.costPrice,[c?"سعر البيع":"Sale Price"]:o.sellingPrice}}));case"suppliers":return d.suppliers.map(o=>({id:`s-${o.id}`,source:"supplier",sourceId:o.id,supplierId:o.id,values:{[c?"المورد":"Supplier"]:o.name,[c?"الشركة":"Company"]:o.company||"-",[c?"الهاتف":"Phone"]:o.phone||"-",[c?"البريد":"Email"]:o.email||"-",[c?"العنوان":"Address"]:o.address||"-",[c?"الرصيد":"Balance"]:o.balance||0}}));case"customers":return d.customers.map(o=>({id:`c-${o.id}`,source:"customer",sourceId:o.id,customerId:o.id,values:{[c?"العميل":"Customer"]:o.name,[c?"الهاتف":"Phone"]:o.phone||"-",[c?"البريد":"Email"]:o.email||"-",[c?"العنوان":"Address"]:o.address||"-",[c?"الرصيد":"Balance"]:o.balance||0}}));case"warehouses":return المنتجات":"Products"]:d.products.filter(M=>String(M.warehouseId||"")===String(o.id)).length,[c?"إجمالي الكمية":"Total Qty"]:d.products.filter(M=>String(M.warehouseId||"")===String(o.id)).reduce((M,p)=>M+p.quantity,0)}}));case"debts":return[...d.customers.filter(o=>o.balance!==0).map(o=>({id:`dc-${o.id}`,source:"customer",sourceId:o.id,customerId:o.id,values:{[c?"الطرف":"Party"]:o.name,[c?"النوع":"Type"]:c?"عميل":"Customer",[c?"الهاتف":"Phone"]:o.phone||"-",[c?"الرصيد":"Balance"]:o.balance}})),...d.suppliers.filter(o=>(o.balance||0)!==0).map(o=>({id:`ds-${o.id}`,source:"supplier",sourceId:o.id,supplierId:o.id,values:{[c?"الطرف":"Party"]:o.name,[c?"النوع":"Type"]:c?"مورد":"Supplier",[c?"الهاتف":"Phone"]:o.phone||"-",[c?"الرصيد":"Balance"]:o.balance||0}}))];case"movements":return d.transactions.map(o=>({id:`t-${o.id}`,source:"transaction",sourceId:o.id,date:o.date,productId:o.productId,customerId:o.customerId,supplierId:o.supplierId,warehouseId:o.warehouseId,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:o.date,[c?"المنتج":"Product"]:we(o.productId),[c?"الحركة":"Movement"]:o.type,[c?"الكمية":"Qty"]:o.quantity,[c?"سعر الوحدة":"Unit Price"]:o.unitPrice,[c?"المخزن":"Warehouse"]:_e(o.warehouseId),[c?"العميل":"Customer"]:Ce(o.customerId),[c?"المورد":"Supplier"]:pe(o.supplierId),[c?"ملاحظات":"Notes"]:o.notes||"-"}}));case"low_stock":return d.products.filter(o=>o.quantity<=o.minQuantity).map(o=>({id:`lp-${o.id}`,source:"product",sourceId:o.id,productId:o.id,categoryId:o.categoryId,warehouseId:o.warehouseId,supplierId:o.supplierId,values:{[c?"المنتج":"Product"]:o.name,[c?"الكود":"Code"]:o.code,[c?"الكمية الحالية":"Current Qty"]:o.quantity,[c?"حد الطلب":"Min Qty"]:o.minQuantity,[c?"العجز":"Shortage"]:Math.max(0,o.minQuantity-o.quantity),[c?"المورد":"Supplier"]:pe(o.supplierId),[c?"المخزن":"Warehouse"]:_e(o.warehouseId)}}));case"sales":return d.invoices.map(o=>({id:`i-${o.id}`,source:"invoice",sourceId:o.id,date:o.date,customerId:o.customerId,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:o.date,[c?"رقم الفاتورة":"Invoice"]:o.invoiceNo||o.id,[c?"العميل":"Customer"]:o.customerName,[c?"الهاتف":"Phone"]:o.customerPhone||"-",[c?"الدفع":"Payment"]:o.paymentMethod,[c?"الأصناف":"Items"]:o.items.length,[c?"الإجمالي":"Total"]:o.total,[c?"الخصم":"Discount"]:o.discount}}));case"purchases":return d.transactions.filter(o=>o.type==="IN"||o.type==="PURCHASE_RETURN").map(o=>({id:`pt-${o.id}`,source:"transaction",sourceId:o.id,date:o.date,productId:o.productId,supplierId:o.supplierId,warehouseId:o.warehouseId,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:o.date,[c?"المنتج":"Product"]:we(o.productId),[c?"النوع":"Type"]:o.type,[c?"المورد":"Supplier"]:pe(o.supplierId),[c?"الكمية":"Qty"]:o.quantity,[c?"سعر الوحدة":"Unit Price"]:o.unitPrice,[c?"الإجمالي":"Total"]:o.quantity*o.unitPrice,[c?"المخزن":"Warehouse"]:_e(o.warehouseId)}}));case"expenses":return d.expenses.map(o=>({id:`e-${o.id}`,source:"expense",sourceId:o.id,date:o.date,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:o.date,[c?"المصروف":"Expense"]:o.title,[c?"الفئة":"Category"]:o.category,[c?"المبلغ":"Amount"]:o.amount,[c?"ملاحظات":"Notes"]:o.notes||"-"}}));case"statements":{const o=d.vouchers.map(p=>({id:`v-${p.id}`,source:"voucher",sourceId:p.id,date:p.date,customerId:p.partyType==="CUSTOMER"?p.partyId:void 0,supplierId:p.partyType==="SUPPLIER"?p.partyId:void السند":"Voucher"]:p.voucherNumber,[c?"الطرف":"Party"]:p.partyType==="CUSTOMER"?Ce(p.partyId):p.partyType==="SUPPLIER"?pe(p.partyId):c?"أخرى":"Other",[c?"نوع الطرف":"Party Type"]:p.partyType,[c?"نوع السند":"Voucher Type"]:p.type,[c?"المبلغ":"Amount"]:p.amount,[c?"طريقة الدفع":"Payment"]:p.paymentMethod,[c?"ملاحظات":"Notes"]:p.notes||"-"}})),M=d.invoices.filter(p=>p.customerId).map(p=>({id:`si-${p.id}`,source:"invoice",sourceId:p.id,date:p.date,customerId:p.customerId,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:p.date,[c?"المرجع":"Reference"]:p.invoiceNo||p.id,[c?"الطرف":"Party"]:p.customerName,[c?"نوع الطرف":"Party Type"]:c?"عميل":"Customer",[c?"الحركة":"Movement"]:c?"فاتورة مبيعات":"Sales Invoice",[c?"مدين":"Debit"]:p.total,[c?"دائن":"Credit"]:0}}));return[...o,...M].sort((p,g)=>String(g.date).localeCompare(String(p.date)))}case"profits":{const o=d.invoices.map(p=>{const g=p.items.reduce((K,je)=>{var ue;return K+(((ue=d.products.find(ke=>ke.id===je.productId))==null?void 0:ue.costPrice)||0)*je.quantity},0);return{id:`pl-${p.id}`,source:"invoice",sourceId:p.id,date:p.date,customerId:p.customerId,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:p.date,[c?"البيان":"Description"]:`${c?"فاتورة بيع":"Sale"} ${p.invoiceNo||p.id}`,[c?"الإيراد":"Revenue"]:p.total,[c?"التكلفة":"Cost"]:g,[c?"المصروف":"Expense"]:0,[c?"الصافي":"Net"]:p.total-g}}}),M=d.expenses.map(p=>({id:`ple-${p.id}`,source:"expense",sourceId:p.id,date:p.date,values:{[c?"التاريخ":"Date"]:p.date,[c?"البيان":"Description"]:p.title,[c?"الإيراد":"Revenue"]:0,[c?"التكلفة":"Cost"]:0,[c?"المصروف":"Expense"]:p.amount,[c?"الصافي":"Net"]:-p.amount}}));return[...o,...M].sort((p,g)=>String(g.date).localeCompare(String(p.date)))}default:return[]}},[te,d.products,d.categories,d.suppliers,d.customers,d.warehouses,d.transactions,d.expenses,d.vouchers,d.invoices,c]),j=m.useMemo(()=>Be.filter(o=>{const M=Object.values(o.values).join(" ").toLowerCase();return(!Ne||!o.date||o.date>=Ne)&&(!V||!o.date||o.date<=V)&&(!G||M.includes(G.toLowerCase()))&&(!F||String(o.productId)===F)&&(!h||String(o.customerId)===h)&&(!f||String(o.supplierId)===f)&&(!W||String(o.categoryId)===W)&&(!E||String(o.warehouseId)===E)}),[Be,G,F,h,f,W,E,Ne,V]),q=m.useMemo(()=>Array.from(new Set(j.flatMap(o=>Object.keys(o.values)))),[j]),ae=((Ve=mm.find(o=>o.id===te))==null?void o=(M,p)=>be[c?M:p];switch(ee.source){case"product":d.setProducts(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,name:o("المنتج","Product")||p.name,code:o("الكود","Code")||p.code,quantity:Number(o("الكمية","Qty")??o("الكمية الحالية","Current Qty")??p.quantity),minQuantity:Number(o("حد الطلب","Min Qty")??p.minQuantity),costPrice:Number(o("التكلفة","Cost")??p.costPrice),sellingPrice:Number(o("سعر البيع","Sale Price")??p.sellingPrice)}:p));break;case"supplier":d.setSuppliers(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,name:o("المورد","Supplier")||o("الطرف","Party")||p.name,company:o("الشركة","Company")||p.company,phone:o("الهاتف","Phone")||p.phone,email:o("البريد","Email")||p.email,address:o("العنوان","Address")||p.address,balance:Number(o("الرصيد","Balance")??p.balance)}:p));break;case"customer":d.setCustomers(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,name:o("العميل","Customer")||o("الطرف","Party")||p.name,phone:o("الهاتف","Phone")||p.phone,email:o("البريد","Email")||p.email,address:o("العنوان","Address")||p.address,balance:Number(o("الرصيد","Balance")??p.balance)}:p));break;case"warehouse":d.setWarehouses(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,name:o("المخزن","Warehouse")||p.name,location:o("الموقع","Location")||p.location}:p));break;case"transaction":d.setTransactions(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,date:o("التاريخ","Date")||p.date,quantity:Number(o("الكمية","Qty")??p.quantity),unitPrice:Number(o("سعر الوحدة","Unit Price")??p.unitPrice),notes:o("ملاحظات","Notes")||p.notes}:p));break;case"expense":d.setExpenses(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,date:o("التاريخ","Date")||p.date,title:o("المصروف","Expense")||o("البيان","Description")||p.title,amount:Number(o("المبلغ","Amount")??o("المصروف","Expense")??p.amount),notes:o("ملاحظات","Notes")||p.notes}:p));break;case"voucher":d.setVouchers(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,date:o("التاريخ","Date")||p.date,amount:Number(o("المبلغ","Amount")??p.amount),notes:o("ملاحظات","Notes")||p.notes}:p));break;case"invoice":d.setInvoices(M=>M.map(p=>p.id===ee.sourceId?{...p,date:o("التاريخ","Date")||p.date,customerName:o("العميل","Customer")||o("الطرف","Party")||p.customerName,customerPhone:o("الهاتف","Phone")||p.customerPhone,discount:Number(o("الخصم","Discount")??p.discount),total:Number(o("الإجمالي","Total")??o("الإيراد","Revenue")??p.total)}:p));break}y(null)},He=o=>{confirm(c?"هل instantly.")&&(o.source==="product"&&d.setProducts(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="supplier"&&d.setSuppliers(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="customer"&&d.setCustomers(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="warehouse"&&d.setWarehouses(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="transaction"&&d.setTransactions(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="expense"&&d.setExpenses(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="voucher"&&d.setVouchers(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)),o.source==="invoice"&&d.setInvoices(M=>M.filter(p=>p.id!==o.sourceId)))};return o.values[M]=="number"&&/الرصيد|المبلغ|الإجمالي|التكلفة|سعر|الإيراد|المصروف|الصافي|Balance|Amount|Total|Cost|Price|Revenue|Expense|Net/.test(M)?`${k}${Number(o.values[M]).toLocaleString()}`:String(o.values[M]??"")},M)),a.jsx("td",{className:"px-3 Rg({products:d,categories:O,suppliers:k,transactions:c,customers:te,warehouses:N,expenses:G,vouchers:Y,invoices:F,teamMembers:X,language:h,companyName:Z,currencySymbol:f=h==="ar"?"ج.م":"$",setProducts:Te,setSuppliers:W,setTransactions:H,setCustomers:E,setWarehouses:ve,setExpenses:Ne,setVouchers:ye,setInvoices:V}){const Q=h==="ar",[ee,y]=m.useState("sales_profits"),[be,ge]=m.useState("month"),[we,Ce]=m.useState(()=>{const g=new Date;return g.setDate(1),g.toISOString().split("T")[0]}),[pe,_e]=m.useState(()=>new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0]),[Se,Be]=m.useState(""),j=g=>{const K=new Date,je=K.toISOString().split("T")[0];if(g==="today")ge("today"),Ce(je),_e(je);else At=d.find(Xa=>Xa.id===Bt.productId);At&&(ke+=At.costPrice*Bt.quantity)}})}),L.forEach(Oe=>{if(Oe.type==="SALE_RETURN"){je+=Oe.quantity*Oe.unitPrice;const Bt=d.find(At=>At.id===Oe.productId);Bt&&(ke-=Bt.costPrice*Oe.quantity)}});const Pe=g-je,Fe=Pe-ke,Ze=$e>0?g/$e:0,gt=Pe>0?Fe/Pe*100:0;let Tt=0,Ae=0,We=0;return $g({isOpen:d,onClose:O,html:k,initialLayout:c,title:te,language:N,showToast:G}){const[Y,F]=m.useState(c),[X,h]=m.useState("portrait"),[Z,f]=m.useState(1),[Te,W]=m.useState("color"),[H,E]=m.useState(c==="thermal"?100:75),[ve,Ne]=m.useState(()=>window.electronAPI?"silent":"browser"),[ye,V]=m.useState("normal"),[Q,ee]=m.useState(110),[y,be]=m.useState("center"),[ge,we]=m.useState([]),[Ce,pe]=m.useState(""),[_e,Se]=m.useState(!1),[Be,j]=m.useState(!1),[q,ae]=m.useState(!1),[L,ie]=m.useState(null),D=N==="ar",R=m.useRef(null);m.useEffect(()=>{d&&(F(c),E(c==="thermal"?100:70))},[d,c]),m.useEffect(()=>{d&&window.electronAPI&&(Se(!0),window.electronAPI.getPrinters().then(o=>{we(o);const           <style>
            ::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none !important; }

              margin: 0 !important;
